subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed in the Most Great Prison, that they who have believed in the Self-Subsisting One, Who was heralded, may rejoice thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم فی السجن الاعظم لیفرح به من آمن بالفرد القیوم الذی بشر به
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prophecy and fulfillment
